title: TNT India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TNT India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
